description: Compare any two scanner runs side-by-side. Select runs from the dropdowns — all panels update automatically.

panels.title: Run History
panels.description: All scanner runs, most recent first. Use the run_id values in the dropdowns above to select runs for comparison.

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_id, started_at, ended_at, gain_db, antenna_position, antenna_arms_cm, antenna_height_m, noise_floor_dbfs, peak_signal_dbfs, round(peak_signal_freq_hz / 1000000, 2) AS peak_mhz, dateDiff('minute', started_at, coalesce(ended_at, now())) AS duration_min, notes FROM spectrum.scan_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Config Diff
panels.description: Side-by-side configuration of the two selected runs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN run_id = '$run_current' THEN 'CURRENT' ELSE 'COMPARE' END AS label, run_id, gain_db, antenna_position, antenna_height_m, antenna_arms_cm, noise_floor_dbfs, peak_signal_dbfs, notes FROM spectrum.scan_runs WHERE run_id IN ('$run_current', '$run_compare') ORDER BY started_at DESC

panels.title: Band Delta
panels.description: Average power, peak, and noise floor per band for each selected run.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN s.run_id = '$run_current' THEN 'current' ELSE 'compare' END AS run, CASE WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 88000000 AND 108000000 THEN '1_FM' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 108000000 AND 137000000 THEN '2_Airband' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 137000000 AND 174000000 THEN '3_VHF' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 174000000 AND 230000000 THEN '4_DVB-T' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 230000000 AND 380000000 THEN '5_Mid' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 380000000 AND 470000000 THEN '6_UHF' END AS band, round(avg(power_dbfs), 1) AS avg_power, round(max(power_dbfs), 1) AS peak, round(quantile(0.10)(power_dbfs), 1) AS noise_floor, count(DISTINCT sweep_id) AS sweeps FROM spectrum.scans s WHERE s.sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND s.run_id IN ('$run_current', '$run_compare') GROUP BY run, band HAVING band IS NOT NULL ORDER BY band, run

panels.title: Key Signals Delta
panels.description: Power at known frequencies for each selected run.

targets.rawSql: WITH kf_lookup AS (SELECT s.run_id, s.freq_hz, max(k.name) AS kf_name, max(s.power_dbfs) AS power FROM spectrum.scans s CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies k WHERE abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(k.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(k.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) AND s.sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND s.run_id IN ('$run_current', '$run_compare') GROUP BY s.run_id, s.freq_hz, s.sweep_id) SELECT CASE WHEN run_id = '$run_current' THEN 'current' ELSE 'compare' END AS run, kf_name AS signal, round(avg(power), 1) AS avg_power, round(max(power), 1) AS peak FROM kf_lookup GROUP BY run, signal ORDER BY signal, run

panels.title: Noise Floor Comparison
panels.description: Noise floor statistics from the UHF quiet zone (400-470 MHz).

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN run_id = '$run_current' THEN 'current' ELSE 'compare' END AS run, round(quantile(0.10)(power_dbfs), 2) AS p10, round(quantile(0.25)(power_dbfs), 2) AS p25, round(quantile(0.50)(power_dbfs), 2) AS median FROM spectrum.scans WHERE freq_hz BETWEEN 400000000 AND 470000000 AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND run_id IN ('$run_current', '$run_compare') GROUP BY run

panels.title: Clipping Comparison
panels.description: ADC clipping rate per run. Clipped = any non-DVB-T bin > -3 dBFS in a sweep.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN run_id = '$run_current' THEN 'current' ELSE 'compare' END AS run, count(DISTINCT sweep_id) AS total, countIf(mp > -3) AS clipped, round(countIf(mp > -3) * 100.0 / count(DISTINCT sweep_id), 1) AS clip_pct FROM (SELECT run_id, sweep_id, max(power_dbfs) AS mp FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND run_id IN ('$run_current', '$run_compare') GROUP BY run_id, sweep_id) GROUP BY run

panels.title: Frequency-by-Frequency Delta
panels.description: Power difference (current minus compare) at each 1 MHz bin. Positive = current run is stronger, negative = compare run was stronger.

targets.rawSql: WITH curr AS (SELECT round(freq_hz / 1000000) AS freq_mhz, avg(power_dbfs) AS power FROM spectrum.scans WHERE run_id = '$run_current' AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' GROUP BY freq_mhz), comp AS (SELECT round(freq_hz / 1000000) AS freq_mhz, avg(power_dbfs) AS power FROM spectrum.scans WHERE run_id = '$run_compare' AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' GROUP BY freq_mhz) SELECT toString(toUInt32(c.freq_mhz)) AS freq_mhz, round(c.power - p.power, 1) AS delta_db FROM curr c JOIN comp p ON c.freq_mhz = p.freq_mhz ORDER BY c.freq_mhz

list.name: run_current
list.label: Current Run
list.query: SELECT run_id FROM spectrum.scan_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC

list.name: run_compare
list.label: Compare To
list.query: SELECT run_id FROM spectrum.scan_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC

title: Run Comparison
